rows.description: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum Diem Novembris. A.D. 1819.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash as its description matches visual evidence more accurately regarding capitalization ('Diem' vs 'diem') and punctuation (no comma after 'Anno'). Both extractors agree on row type and lack of monetary values.
All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification confirms accuracy.
Selected gemini-flash's description due to correct 'æ' ligature in 'præsentis', which is clearly visible in the image. Monetary values and row type are consistent across both and visually confirmed.
All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification confirms accuracy.

Visually verified the pence fraction is clearly 0.75 (3/4), as reported by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read it as 0.25. gemini-flash also provided a valuable note identifying a calculation discrepancy (previous rows sum to 2754.16.3 1/4, but this row records 2754.16.3 3/4), demonstrating careful analysis.

Selected gemini-flash's description due to correct 'æ' ligature in 'præcedentis', which is clearly visible in the image. Monetary values and row type are consistent across both and visually confirmed.

Selected gpt-5-mini's description as 'Receptorum' is visually accurate. Both extractors agree on the monetary values (4402.5.3 1/2). gemini-flash's note is valued for correctly identifying that this total, when calculated from the *visually correct* Row 5 (2754.16.3 3/4) and Row 6 (1647.9.0 1/4), should be 4402.5.4, indicating a discrepancy in the original ledger's handwritten total. The extraction reflects the handwritten value.
All extractors agree on the description, type, and lack of monetary values. Visual verification confirms accuracy.

Selected gemini-flash's description for more accurate transcription of the abbreviated Latin, specifically 'Rectori.', 'Scholar:', and 'Officiari:'. gpt-5-mini indicated ambiguity but provided a less precise transcription. Monetary values and row type are consistent across both and visually confirmed.
All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification and arithmetic check confirm accuracy.
All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification confirms accuracy.
All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification and arithmetic check confirm accuracy.

All extractors agree on the description and monetary values. Selected 'entry' for row_type (gemini-flash) as this is an input value for a subsequent calculation, consistent with the definition of an entry. Visual verification confirms accuracy, and both correctly identify this as a reference to the 'Summa Receptorum' total (Row 7).

All extractors agree on the description and monetary values. Selected 'entry' for row_type (gemini-flash) as this is an input value for a subsequent calculation. Visual verification confirms accuracy, and both correctly identify this as a reference to the 'Summa Solutorum' total (Row 12).
All extractors agree on the description, type, and monetary values. Visual verification and arithmetic check (4402.5.3 1/2 - 3075.7.9 1/2 = 1326.17.6) confirm accuracy.
All extractors agree on the description, type, and lack of monetary values. Visual verification confirms accuracy.

Selected gemini-flash for its accurate description (including the final period) and 'entry' row type, as this is a specific signatory, not a general section header. Visual verification confirms the text.

Selected gemini-flash's description and 'entry' type. Visually, the initial appears to be 'P' and the surname 'Johnson', followed by 'Subrectorem'. While challenging, gemini-flash's reading is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's low-confidence and highly uncertain attempt.

Selected gemini-flash's description and 'entry' type. Visual inspection suggests 'I. Rosdew. Decanum.' is a more accurate transcription of the challenging cursive text than gpt-5-mini's highly uncertain reading ('J. ?eaderus').

Selected gemini-flash's description and 'entry' type. Despite being condensed, 'Tho Smyth Glubb. Burs. Senr.' is a much more accurate reading of the cursive than gpt-5-mini's speculative attempt. Visual verification supports gemini-flash.

Selected gemini-flash's description and 'entry' type. The reading 'J. V. Heys. Burs. Junr.' aligns more accurately with the visual evidence, specifically the 'V' initial and the punctuation after 'Burs'. gpt-5-mini's alternative reading ('I. Heyes Burs: Junr.') is less precise.
Selected gemini-flash's description and 'entry' type. The initial 'W.' is clearly visible in the image, which gpt-5-mini missed. Visual verification confirms the complete text.

Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Dec: 1.mo 1819.' as 'Dec' (for December) is visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Die:'. Used gemini-flash's 'entry' for row_type, as it is a specific date record, not a header. Visual verification confirms the text and date format.
